data.location: 12325 Northlake Blvd, Suite 130, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33412
data.short_description: Smoke & Maple Gastropub is opening its first-ever location at Avenir Palm Beach Gardens, co-founded by Nick Lanier and led by chef Dave Schroeder. The 167-seat gastropub will offer elevated food and cocktails, local beers, and locally sourced ingredients at approachable prices. It will feature an indoor/outdoor bar with bifold windows.

Viral dirty soda brand Swig is planning a corporate-owned location at Brand Properties' Birch House mixed-use development in Lawrenceville, GA. It will be only the second location in Georgia for the Utah-based franchise. Further details regarding the opening timeline remain unclear.

data.status: planning a new opening in Alpharetta this summer
data.short_description: TQM Hospitality is opening Amasa Mexican Kitchen at City Center in Alpharetta, a seafood-focused, gluten-free sister concept to Chichería Mexican Kitchen with an emphasis on blue corn tortillas. The restaurant will feature a tequila room with margarita flights, communal tables, two private dining rooms, live entertainment, and a Mexico City-inspired Sunday cazuela brunch buffet.

data.location: Likely in the Belmont corridor, North Side, Chicago (Address not specified)
data.status: moving into a permanent space sometime this year
data.short_description: Unique Sweets, a sweets business that creates opportunities for autistic adults, is moving from pop-ups to a permanent brick-and-mortar cafe, likely in the Belmont corridor on Chicago's North Side. No lease has been signed yet and no address or opening date has been confirmed. The menu will include coffees, teas, light sandwiches, and pastries.

The former Malaga Diner, which closed in 2023, is set to reopen as Jersey Diner & Restaurant under new owner Yilmaz Kangal, who has over 30 years of diner industry experience. The remodeled space features new interior design and an expanded menu including more Italian food, seafood, a bakery, and a salad bar. It will operate daily from 6 a.m. to 11 p.m.

The Thurman Cafe, a German Village burger spot that has operated since 1942, is temporarily closed following an electrical fire on April 12 that caused significant structural damage. Owner Mike Suclescy is unsure of the reopening date, and no details about the extent of renovations have been announced.

Chris Hetterly plans to open Bagel's Bagels at 2805 6th Ave in Tacoma, a family-owned New York-style bagel shop named after his daughter's cat. The shop will launch with classic bagel varieties and feature a full kitchen serving breakfast and lunch sandwiches. No opening date is provided in the article.

data.store_name: Pink Rose Cafe (rebranding of Amore Caffe)
data.event_date: Before end of year (year not specified)
data.status: likely to be operating before the end of the year
data.short_description: Amore Caffe in Hillcrest, San Diego is set to rebrand as Pink Rose Cafe, confirmed by co-owner Rodolfo Salum, as a "totally different concept." Pink Rose Cafe currently has one existing location in La Mesa, making this its second San Diego-area location. No official opening date has been announced.

Coast Thai-Way, a Lao-Thai restaurant owned by Stella Bayphouthongkham, is expected to open at 698 N. Coast Highway 101 in Leucadia by early summer 2026. The restaurant will take over the former A Little Moore Cafe space and blend ancestral Lao-Thai recipes with Southern California seasonal produce and coastal influences. Initial hours are expected to run Wednesday through Monday, with lunch and dinner service.

data.location: 28601 Marguerite Pkwy, Suite A2, Mission Viejo, CA 92691
data.short_description: Slurp & Sip is planned for Mission Viejo at 28601 Marguerite Pkwy, Suite A2, taking over a former Yo! Mochi space, according to plans submitted to the County Health Department. The concept offers an interactive self-serve ramyun bar experience along with snacks, drinks, and ready-to-eat options inspired by Korean convenience store culture. No opening timeline has been announced.

data.location: 204 S El Camino Real, San Clemente, CA 92672
data.short_description: Jimmy B's is expected to open in San Clemente at 204 S El Camino Real, based on a recent liquor license application and social media posts. The new location comes from restaurateur Jim Bellino, who also operates Jimmy B's in Palm Springs and the Auto Vault in San Juan Capistrano. Details about the San Clemente menu have not yet been confirmed.

Millennium Restaurant, an award-winning vegan restaurant in Oakland, is closing on May 16 after a 30-plus-year run, with co-owner Alison Bagby citing the pandemic as a contributing factor. The owners plan to rebrand and continue operating a different, smaller concept at the same location without vacating or relocating. No finalized plans for the new concept have been announced.

data.store_name: Vinnie's Bar and Grill Brentwood (Vinnie's Emporium)
data.status: set to open a second location; intends to open by July 4th
data.short_description: Owner Vincent Parker is opening a second location of Vinnie's Bar and Grill at 561 First Street in Brentwood, dubbed Vinnie's Emporium, targeting a July 4th opening. The concept will blend live music and a local pub atmosphere, carrying over signature American bar food from the original Concord location. Several details still need to be finalized at time of publication.

data.location: 2107 E. 17th St., Unit A, Santa Ana, CA 92705
data.status: slated to open its tenth location
data.short_description: Baja Fish Tacos is slated to open its tenth location and second in Santa Ana at the former Knowlwood space at 2107 E. 17th St., Unit A, according to a recent liquor license application. The brand focuses on Mexican-inspired seafood and grilled offerings. No opening date was available at time of publication.

Shingletown Saloon, a country-themed bar and gastropub in Ballard that has operated since 2015, announced its permanent closure on April 25, 2026, citing lease challenges and financial strain. The team shared the news via Instagram, noting that rising rent and an unstable Seattle economy made it no longer financially sustainable to continue.

P.J. Whelihan's Pub + Restaurant is opening a new location at The Village at Newtown, taking over the former Iron Hill Brewery space at 2920 S Eagle Road. No official opening date has been announced, but construction is underway. The brand, founded in 1983, now operates 25 locations across Pennsylvania and New Jersey.

Banh Mi Boys opened its latest franchise location on April 12 in Mandeville at 4350 LA-22, operated by the same franchisees behind the New Orleans Magazine Street location. The opening was driven by high demand from fans on the Northshore. The brand is also planning future locations in Modesto, California and Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

Banh Mi Boys is planning a location in Modesto, California, which will be a conversion of an existing bubble tea shop. Owner Peter Nguyen noted that navigating California's regulatory landscape has introduced new challenges. No opening timeline has been announced.

data.location: 119 N El Camino Real, Encinitas, CA 92024
data.short_description: Pastaria Vivi, a chef-led pasta concept founded by chefs Brandon Jennings and William Treff, has opened at Encinitas Village Shopping Center, combining a pasta shop, casual dining, and an Italian retail market. The concept offers over 75 pasta and sauce combinations, a monthly "Vivi Pasta Box" subscription, and plans to add pasta-making classes and an in-house flour mill by 2027.

Amasa, a modern Latin steakhouse led by Christopher Loeffl and operated by hospitality group Apicii, has opened at the Kimpton Era Midtown New York near Rockefeller Center. The restaurant features a dinner menu with raw bar dishes, premium steaks, seafood, and agave-based cocktails, and sits below Bar Amasa with an adjoining casual cantina.

The Chinese Cowboy, an Asian-American BBQ-style fusion restaurant at 727 SE Washington Street in Portland, served its final meal on April 11, citing ongoing economic challenges. The space was originally opened as Warsugai by Chef Kyo Koo in January 2024 before being transformed into The Chinese Cowboy in April 2025.

data.location: Knox Street mixed-use development, Dallas (Address not specified)
data.status: on deck to open in early 2027
data.short_description: Théa Mediterranean Rooftop, the latest concept from restaurateur Sam Fox, is bringing a Mediterranean dining and rooftop bar experience to Dallas's Knox Street mixed-use development. The Dallas location will add a Mediterranean lunch option not available at the original Phoenix location, with 8,600 square feet of indoor space and 3,000 square feet for al fresco dining. The restaurant is on deck to open in early 2027.

data.location: 420 E Pleasant Run Rd, Cedar Hill, TX 75104
data.event_date: Before end of summer (year not specified)
data.status: work set to start this summer
data.short_description: Wonder food hall has filed papers for a new location at 420 East Pleasant Run Road in Cedar Hill, TX, with construction set to begin June 8 and wrap by August 3. The 4,500-square-foot space is part of the brand's ongoing DFW expansion, with several other locations in development in the region.

data.location: 3411 Renner Road, Plano (Address not specified — no zip code given)
data.status: work set to start this summer
data.short_description: Husband-and-wife team Robert and Nikki La Grace are opening a Port of Subs location at 3411 Renner Road in Plano, TX, in a newly constructed 1,400-square-foot storefront, with construction set to start this summer. The La Graces plan to open 20 Port of Subs locations across the DFW. The Nevada-founded chain has more than 125 locations open nationally.

data.event_date: Late spring or early summer (year not specified)
data.status: on deck to open in late spring or early summer
data.short_description: Cracker Barrel is planning to open a new Prosper location at 3830 West University Drive, with an anticipated opening in late spring or early summer. The American dining chain, which first opened in 1969, now has over 650 locations across the US.

data.location: 74 S Market St, East Palestine, OH 44413
data.event_date: Later this year (year not specified); approximately two months after bidding process starts
data.status: opening date will be around two months after the bidding process starts
data.short_description: Full City Roastery is opening a brick-and-mortar coffee shop at 74 Market Street in downtown East Palestine, OH, the second location for owner Ben Ratner, whose sister business LiB's Market operates in Salem. Construction is expected to last until at least the end of spring, with a menu featuring coffee, wraps, flatbreads, and pastries, with plans for future dinner options.

data.location: Delta Landing mixed-use development, Hernando (street name not yet known; door number 1107)
data.short_description: A Cajun restaurant concept born during COVID-19 is opening a second location in Hernando, MS as part of the Delta Landing mixed-use development. Construction began in December of last year and a nearly completed restaurant space has a "coming soon" sign in the window.

data.status: opening in Sterling in June of this year
data.short_description: Wonder food hall is opening a new location at 20980 Southbank Street in Sterling, VA, this summer, as one of several locations open or coming soon in the greater DC area. The brand partners with high-profile chefs to offer multiple dining concepts under one roof with meals made to order on a single bill.

data.location: Water Tower District at Schilling Farms, Collierville (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Taziki's Mediterranean Cafe is planning a new 2,581-square-foot location in Collierville, TN at the Water Tower District at Schilling Farms. No official opening date has been announced, and it will be the brand's fifth location in the greater Memphis area.

data.status: on track to open in early May
data.short_description: Ray Mah Cafe, an 8,500-square-foot coffee shop at 3895 Hacks Cross Road in Memphis, is on track to open in early May, featuring in-house roasted beans, Yemeni brews, specialty coffees, desserts, fresh juice, and ice cream. The founders plan to franchise the concept following the debut.

data.location: Oakville Row, Alexandria's Oakville Triangle (precise address not yet publicly available)
data.status: opening timeline is not presently established
data.short_description: Florida-based Mexican chain Talkin' Tacos has signed a lease for a 2,500-square-foot storefront on Oakville Row in Alexandria's Oakville Triangle, with no opening timeline yet established. The fast-casual concept launched as a food truck in Florida in 2020 and will join Japanese eatery Waraku and ramen concept Mensho in the development.

data.location: Gramercy Park Drive, Loudoun Station development, Ashburn (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Taste Buds Kitchen is bringing its first DMV location to a 2,600-square-foot storefront on Gramercy Park Drive in the Loudoun Station development in Ashburn, introduced by franchisee Teddra Burgess. The concept blends community, culinary education, and food and has 18+ locations nationally. No opening date is mentioned in the article.

Keystone Hospitality is opening a surf and turf restaurant called Chandelier at 1201 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, the former home of Del Frisco's, described as the group's biggest project to date. The concept will feature a waterfall fire feature, modern luxurious decor, elevated food and cocktails. No opening date is provided in the article.

Las Brasas Tacos & Salsas is reopening at its former location at 537B Main Street in Woodland after closing at the end of September 2024 to focus on catering. The restaurant, founded by Chef Rudy Peniche, serves casual Mexican cuisine including burritos, tacos, and tortas.

data.location: 2670 East County Line Rd, Suite I, Highlands Ranch, CO 80126
data.short_description: Graze Craze, a specialty charcuterie concept, is currently under construction at 2670 East County Line Rd, Suite I in Highlands Ranch's Promenade Shopping Center, listed as "coming soon" on the company's website. No official opening date has been announced, and local franchisee Sara Clay will oversee the location.

7Brew Coffee is constructing a new 600-square-foot drive-thru coffee shop at 10011 Wurzbach Road in The Colonnade area of San Antonio, with construction slated to start in August and wrap by November. The $1 million project is anticipated to be open by winter, barring construction or permitting issues.

data.location: 9580 Oak Ave Pkwy, Suite 12A, Folsom, CA 95630
data.short_description: Pizza Factory is preparing to open a new location in the Folsom Village shopping center at 9580 Oak Avenue Parkway, Suite 12A, in the former Folsom Family Taekwondo space. Husband-and-wife franchisees Mandeep and Sukhwinder Kaur are behind the project, targeting a summer 2026 opening with the brand's full pizza lineup plus dine-in and takeout service.

data.location: 809 N Main St K11, Las Vegas, NV 89101
data.event_date: Before end of year (year not specified)
data.status: anticipated to open in West Las Vegas before the end of the year
data.short_description: THE MAC is a new restaurant concept set to open at 809 N Main Street K11 in West Las Vegas's Downtown Arts District, with the LLC Augustus Holdings NV just made official at the time of publication. No menu details, social media presence, or additional information were available at time of writing.

Family-owned burger joint Burger Me! is eyeing a new location at 13345 Lincoln Way in Auburn, CA, based on a recently filed beer and wine license. Co-owner Tom Farina confirmed details remain under wraps, with more information expected down the line. The brand currently operates four locations across Truckee, South Lake Tahoe, and Reno.

data.event_date: Before end of year (year not specified)
data.status: anticipated to open before the end of the year
data.short_description: Laika Cheesecake & Espresso is planning to open its fifth location inside TPC Retail & Office at 2230 TPC Parkway, Suite 1103 in San Antonio, with construction slated to start in early May and wrap before mid-November per a recently filed permit. The brand was founded in 2020 and is known for gourmet cheesecakes, espresso drinks, and specialty beverages.

data.location: 4370 Town Center Blvd, Suite 110, El Dorado Hills, CA 95762
data.status: things are finally moving in that direction
data.short_description: Kings Meats, a family-run butcher shop originally based in Diamond Springs, is moving forward with plans for a second location at 4370 Town Center Blvd, Suite 110 in El Dorado Hills Town Center. Owner Casey King confirmed the 4,000-square-foot-plus space but provided no official opening date.

data.event_date: Winter (year not specified) / beginning of 2027 at latest
data.status: open before the end of the year at the latest, beginning of 2027
data.short_description: The Kebab Shop is opening a new location in Kingwood at 4361 Kingwood Drive, with construction on the $375,000 project slated to begin in July and complete before end of December. The family-owned fast-casual Mediterranean chain has more than 50 locations across California, Texas, and Florida.

Moxie Burger has a new location on the way to Chastain Market at 4600 Roswell Road in Atlanta, which will be its sixth location. No opening timeline was available at time of publication, and What Now Atlanta has reached out to ownership for more details.

data.status: targeting a June or July opening
data.short_description: Blu Jam Cafe's first franchise location is gearing up to open at 11049 Magnolia Blvd, Suite 400 in North Hollywood, with franchisee Arman Boghosian targeting a June or July opening. The 2,200-square-foot breakfast and brunch spot will feature a dine-in area, patio, and the brand's full menu.

data.status: joining the Parker Commons community soon
data.short_description: Taiwan-based 85°C Bakery Cafe is preparing to open its first Colorado location at 2767 South Parker Road inside Aurora's Parker Commons shopping center. The brand has over 1,000 locations worldwide and will offer more than 50 varieties of freshly baked pastries prepared hourly alongside handcrafted drinks. No official opening timeline was available at time of publication.

data.status: under construction; no grand opening date yet, but it should be in late May
data.short_description: Vietnamese coffee and boba shop Phin Caphe is opening its third location in Happy Valley at 12000 SE 82nd Ave, currently under construction with no grand opening date yet but expected in late May. The concept began in Portland in 2022 and expanded to Beaverton in 2024, and will serve the same menu of Vietnamese coffees, milk teas, smoothies, and Banh Mi.

data.status: planning to open a second location
data.short_description: The Drunken Crow Pub & Grub, founded in 2024 and currently located at 9401 Northeast Covington Road in Vancouver, is planning to open a second location at 8605 NE Hwy 99, Suite 100, the former home of Top Bop. The menu features pizzas, Not Pizza entrees, and brunch items. No opening timeline has been announced.

data.event_date: June (year not specified); grand opening in late summer
data.short_description: Three Rabbits Brewing is targeting a June opening at 214 Commerce Place in Greensboro, with a grand opening planned for late summer. The 3,400-square-foot space will feature a 1,500-square-foot taproom with a German pub atmosphere, serving German-style beers alongside IPAs, stouts, sours, ciders, and bar snacks.

Pflugerville Pfood Park is a new food truck park in the works at 20011 FM 685, targeting a summer opening with 10 international food trucks featuring cuisine from Nepal, India, Thailand, and barbecue. The development will also include a play area for kids and a bar, though owner Shanker Tamang cautioned that the summer target is optimistic given permitting timelines.

data.location: 3001 Joe Dimaggio Blvd, Round Rock (Address not specified — no zip code given)
data.short_description: Tejas Meat Supply expanded to a new location in Round Rock at 3001 Joe Dimaggio Blvd, which opened during opening weekend on March 14. The butcher shop and restaurant is known for fresh-cut meats from sustainable Texas ranches, house-made sausages, jerky, charcuterie, beer, and wines.

data.status: remodel of an existing restaurant space
data.short_description: A new TDLR filing indicates Tejas Meat Supply is planning a location at 221 N Main Street in Taylor, TX, involving a $350,000 remodel of an existing restaurant space with a new bar and service counter, dining furniture, and kitchen equipment. Work is expected to run from June 15 to September 11.

data.location: 1100 Peachtree St NE, Suite 110, Atlanta, GA 30309
data.short_description: Paris Baguette has a new location heading to Midtown Atlanta at 1100 Peachtree St. NE, Suite 110, in a 2,144-square-foot space, which will be the brand's third Atlanta location. The location is listed as "coming soon" on the website and renovations are still underway, with no exact opening timeline confirmed.

data.location: 210 Ed Schmidt Blvd, Suite 100, Hutto, TX 78634
data.short_description: Rice Stop is an upcoming restaurant opening at 210 Ed Schmidt Boulevard in Hutto, TX, in the former Stockade Kitchen space, serving Chinese and Vietnamese cuisine alongside boba tea. Construction is actively underway on the dining room as of coverage published March 31, with no official opening timeline yet announced.

Sam Hellman-Mass and chef-partner Fermín Núñez are planning to open a new taqueria at 2002 Manor Road in Austin, the site of Hoover's Cooking, which will close at the end of this spring. No name, opening date, or additional details have been announced for the taqueria.

data.status: will close at the end of this spring
data.short_description: Hoover's Cooking, which has operated at 2002 Manor Road for 40 years, will close at the end of this spring. The site will subsequently be used for a new taqueria by Sam Hellman-Mass and chef-partner Fermín Núñez.

Bap Bowl Korean Kitchen is planning a second location at 10920 Baymeadows Rd in Jacksonville's Reedy Branch Commons Shopping Center, with owner Jason Wu targeting a January/February 2027 opening. The Korean cuisine concept currently operates its first location at 7534 Beach Blvd, Bay 9.

data.event_date: Second week of May (year not specified)
data.status: looking to reopen in the middle of May, probably the second week
data.short_description: Ale Pie House, an Italian cuisine and specialty pizza restaurant that spent ten years at 3951 St. Johns Ave. in Jacksonville, is relocating and reopening at 1580 Wells Rd in Orange Park with the same menu in mid-May. The restaurant will keep its existing hours following the move.

data.location: 20 W Cochran St, Simi Valley, CA 93065
data.short_description: Simi Valley Brewing Company is opening at 20 West Cochran Street in Simi Valley, with founder Ali Zia aiming for a June opening pending inspections and liquor license permitting. The 8,400-square-foot space will feature a taproom accommodating 200 customers indoors and 200 on an outdoor patio, serving rotating West Coast IPAs, lagers, and pub food with a barbecue emphasis.

data.location: 10065 W San Juan Way, Littleton, CO 80127
data.short_description: Los Dos Potrillos Mexican Restaurant's Littleton location at 10065 West San Juan Way temporarily closed following a kitchen fire in early March 2026, with recovery and repair efforts actively underway. No official reopening date has been announced, though the team states progress is being made to meet safety standards before reopening.
The article covers a networking event hosted by What Now Media Group at The Liam's Steakhouse in Dallas on April 2, 2026. No restaurant openings or closures are reported.

data.status: A timeline for opening has not been announced yet
data.short_description: Postino Wine Bar will open at Goodyear's GSQ development at the corner of Bullard Avenue and McDowell Road. The brand has nearly 30 locations across seven states and is known for its wine selection, bruschetta boards, and monthly bottle club.

data.location: 15 Place Simon-Valois; 6805 Ney Street; 1700 Ontario Street East — Montreal (no zip codes given)
data.status: will continue under new ownership at the same locations
data.short_description: Montreal-based Arhoma Bakery has been acquired by former NFL player Laurent Duvernay-Tardif and Sasha Ghavami, with all existing locations, products, and the overall concept remaining in place following the ownership transition. The bakery's previous founders are stepping away after 19 years of operating the business.

Palermo Argentinian Bistro is opening a new location in SoHo at 55 Grand Street, the former Papatzul Soho space, in a 2,720-square-foot split-level space accommodating 65 guests. The menu will specialize in Argentinian grilled meats, empanadas, and a raw bar, with a beverage program highlighting Argentinian wines and cocktails.
